summary: Testing completed for GITB LMS landing page, school detail pages, course detail pages, login forgot password flow, and backend APIs. Major finding: Course cards on landing page link to courses that don't exist in CourseDetailPage's hardcoded data - data mismatch between API courses and static CourseDetailPage.

integration_issues.flow: Course card click from landing page
integration_issues.issue: Course cards link to /course/:slug but CourseDetailPage has hardcoded courses with different slugs. API returns courses like 'Venture Creation' -> 'venture-creation' but CourseDetailPage has courses like 'ui-ux-webflow', 'kyc-compliance'

issues: Some images show alt text instead of actual images (likely Cloudflare 524 timeout or missing images)

passed_tests: Landing page displays all sections: Hero, PathForEveryone, PartnerLogos, OurSchools, NanoDiplomaIntro, TrendingPrograms, ReimaginingDream, Stats, Testimonials, BlogSection, Footer
All 5 school cards in 'Our Schools' section have correct data-testid attributes
All 5 school cards are clickable Links with correct href (/schools/:schoolId)
School detail page (/schools/engineering) loads correctly with 'Available Programs' section
School detail page shows 3 programs: Software Engineering, Cyber-Security Vulnerability Tester, IAM
Course cards in Trending Programs have data-testid and correct href attributes
Login page loads correctly with data-testid='login-page'
Login page has 'Forgot Password?' button that opens modal
Forgot Password modal has email input and 'Send Reset Link' button
failed_tests: Course detail page shows 'Course Not Found' when clicking course cards from landing page (data mismatch between API courses and hardcoded CourseDetailPage)
Some pages encounter Cloudflare 524 timeout intermittently
action_items: FIX (HIGH): CourseDetailPage needs to either 1) fetch course data from API using courseId, or 2) update getSlug mapping in LandingPage to match hardcoded courses, or 3) add all API courses to CourseDetailPage's static data

The course cards from /api/courses/public generate slugs like 'venture-creation', 'product-management', 'data-analytics-with-excel' but CourseDetailPage only has 'ui-ux-webflow', 'kyc-compliance', 'cybersecurity-vulnerability', etc.
Consider making CourseDetailPage dynamic by fetching from /api/courses/:courseId instead of hardcoded data
critical_code_review_comments: Route mismatch fixed: Added /course/:courseId route in addition to /courses/:courseId to match the links in LandingPage
CourseDetailPage has hardcoded course data that doesn't match courses from API - needs dynamic data fetching or proper slug mapping

success_rate.frontend: 75% - Landing page and school pages work, course detail pages have data mismatch issue

context_for_next_testing_agent: 1) Landing page all sections verified working. 2) School cards link to /schools/:schoolId and school detail page shows programs correctly. 3) CRITICAL: Course cards from API generate different slugs than CourseDetailPage's hardcoded data - clicking course cards shows 'Course Not Found'. 4) Forgot password modal and backend API working. 5) Intermittent Cloudflare 524 timeouts - infrastructure issue. 6) Fixed App.js to add /course/:courseId route.

infrastructure_notes.cloudflare_524: Intermittent Cloudflare 524 timeout errors occur on various pages. This is infrastructure-related, not code-related. Wait and retry usually works.

school_cards_clickable.description: All 5 school cards (engineering, data, product, creative, business) have correct data-testid and link to /schools/:schoolId

course_cards_clickable.description: Cards are clickable and have correct hrefs, but destination pages show 'Course Not Found' due to data mismatch

course_detail_page.description: Shows 'Course Not Found' for courses from API because CourseDetailPage has different hardcoded courses

forgot_password_flow.description: Modal opens, has email input and submit button, backend API works

reset_password_page.description: Route exists at /reset-password, shows error without token (expected), couldn't fully test due to Cloudflare timeouts
